ListItem.Para: APU is not used.
Left AGCU operates normally.
VFSG systems operate normally.
EDTO beyond 180 minutes is not conducted.

Note.Para: A VFSG system is considered to be operating normally if its associated status message (ELEC GEN SYS L1, L2, R1 or R2) is not displayed.
Following an APU battery singled cell event, refer to AMM DDG 24-31-01 for procedures required for continued operation.

ListItem.Para: Open and collar the P49 panel circuit breaker APU BAT CHGR OUTPUT.

Note.Para: ELEC GEN CTRL UNIT L1, L2, R1, R2 status message may display when external power is applied. These messages must be cleared prior to dispatch. For electrical generator control status messages displayed, cycle power to each generator control unit one at a time.

ListItem.Para: For ELEC GEN CTRL UNIT L1 status message:
Open P49 panel, circuit breaker GCU-LX BAT
Open P300 panel, circuit breaker GCU-L1 CAPT
Open P400 panel, circuit breaker GCU-L1 R28
Wait 20 seconds.
Close all three circuit breakers.
For ELEC GEN CTRL UNIT L2 status message:
Open P49 panel, circuit breaker GCU-LX BAT
Open P300 panel, circuit breaker GCU-L2 CAPT
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker GCU-L2 R28.
Wait 20 seconds.
Close all three circuit breakers.
For ELEC GEN CTRL UNIT R1 status message:
Open P49 panel, circuit breaker GCU-RX BAT
Open P400 panel, circuit breaker GCU-R1 FO
Open P300 panel, circuit breaker GCU-R1 L28
Wait 20 seconds.
Close all three circuit breakers.
For ELEC GEN CTRL UNIT R2 status message:
Open P49 panel, circuit breaker GCU-RX BAT
Open P400 panel, circuit breaker GCU-R2 FO
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker GCU-R2 L28.
Wait 20 seconds.
Close all three circuit breakers.

Note.Para: The ELEC APU STARTER R status message may be displayed.
Simultaneous engine start is not allowed.

ListItem.Para: EDTO beyond 180 minutes is not conducted.
Start the first engine using the Ground Power Engine Start Supplementary Procedure.
The following weight & balance information is provided for dispatch following a single cell battery event that results in the APU battery being moved or removed.
Weight: 64 lb (29kg)
Balance arm: 1397 in
Balance arm: 1517 in
